mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_post (user_id, title, description, images, video_url, location_name, location_point, latitude, longitude, post_date, tags, view_count, like_count) VALUES (#{post.userId}, #{post.title}, #{post.description}, #{post.images, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}::jsonb, #{post.videoUrl}, #{post.locationName}, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{post.longitude}, #{post.latitude}), 4326)::geography, #{post.latitude}, #{post.longitude}, #{post.postDate}, #{post.tags, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}::jsonb, 0, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, title, description, images, video_url, location_name, latitude, longitude, post_date, tags, view_count, like_count, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM t_post WHERE is_deleted = false AND ST_Contains( ST_MakeEnvelope(#{minLng}, #{minLat}, #{maxLng}, #{maxLat}, 4326)::geography::geometry, location_point::geometry ) ORDER BY post_date DESC LIMIT 100
